title: COSMOS 2026: Exploring Infinite Possibilities Through Technology and Innovation
description: Join us for COSMOS 2026, a groundbreaking event designed to immerse students at Polytechnic University of the Philippine...
venue: Ninoy Aquino Library and Learning Resources Center, Polyetechnic University of the Philippines, Manila, NCR, PH, 1008

title: Build with AI Polytechnic University of the Philippines DAY 1
description: Join us for an exciting hybrid event - "Build with AI: Polytechnic University of the Philippines". Dive into the world of artificial intelligence and discover how to leverage tools like Notion, Gamma, Vertex, IoT, and Antigravity to create groundbreaking solutions. This is your chance to learn from the best, collaborate with peers, and enhance your skillset in the field of AI.
